sight:igeler-saeule.heading: Activities in and around Trier

sight:liebfrauenkirche.intro: Guided Old Town walks showcase the churches and landmarks of the city center.

sight:rheinisches-landesmuseum.intro: To really understand Roman Trier, pair your museum visit with a guided tour of the Old Town.

sight:museum-am-dom.heading: See more of Trier
sight:museum-am-dom.intro: A guided tour of the historic Old Town is well worth it around the cathedral.

sight:karl-marx-haus.heading: Explore Trier around Karl Marx
sight:karl-marx-haus.intro: Your museum visit pairs nicely with a guided stroll through the Old Town.

sight:spielzeugmuseum.heading: Discover Trier with the family
sight:spielzeugmuseum.intro: After the Toy Museum, a relaxed city walk through Trier makes a great next stop.

sight:st-matthias.heading: Trier on your own and guided
sight:st-matthias.intro: A guided Old Town walk links the Basilica of St. Matthias with the city's other highlights.

sight:st-paulin.heading: Experience Trier's churches and Old Town
sight:st-paulin.intro: Guided walks place St. Paulin in the context of Trier's rich architectural history.

sight:dreikoenigenhaus.heading: Discover medieval Trier
sight:dreikoenigenhaus.intro: The Dreikönigenhaus sits along the route of many guided Old Town walks.

sight:hauptmarkt.heading: City tours from the Hauptmarkt
sight:hauptmarkt.intro: The Hauptmarkt is the starting point and highlight of almost every guided Old Town tour in Trier.

sight:kurfuerstliches-palais.heading: Guided tours to the Palace and Palace Garden
sight:kurfuerstliches-palais.intro: The Electoral Palace and Palace Garden are regular stops on guided Old Town walks.

sight:mariensaeule.heading: Combine the view and the Old Town
sight:mariensaeule.intro: A guided tour of Trier rounds off your trip up to the Mariensäule column.

sight:petrisberg.heading: Trier from above and up close

sight:weinkulturpfad-olewig.intro: Around the wine village of Olewig you'll find guided wine hikes and tastings of Mosel wines.

cat:unesco-welterbe.intro: Guided walks to the Roman World Heritage monuments of Trier.

cat:aussicht-wandern.heading: Hikes with a view

cat:mosel-aktivitaeten.heading: Activities on the Mosel

district:innenstadt.heading: City tours through the Old Town
district:innenstadt.intro: Guided walks through the city center take in the Porta Nigra, Hauptmarkt and Cathedral in one route.

district:olewig.heading: Wine tastings around Olewig
district:olewig.intro: Olewig is the wine village of Trier, so it's the place for guided wine tastings and winery tours on the Mosel.

district:trier-sued.heading: Roman Trier in the south
district:trier-sued.intro: The Amphitheater and Imperial Baths lie in the south, ideal for tours of the city's Roman history.

district:trier-nord.heading: Tours and experiences in Trier
district:trier-nord.intro: From Trier-Nord it's easy to set off on the classic guided walks through the Old Town.

district:trier-west-pallien.heading: Mosel cruises on the west bank

district:kuerenz.heading: City experiences in Trier
district:kuerenz.intro: From the university district of Kürenz you can quickly reach the guided tours through Trier's Old Town.

district:pfalzel.heading: Mosel tours near Pfalzel
district:pfalzel.intro: Pfalzel sits right on the water, a great match for cruises and boat tours on the Mosel.

district:ruwer-eitelsbach.heading: Wine experiences in the Ruwer valley
district:ruwer-eitelsbach.intro: The Ruwer valley is known for its wines, with wine tastings and winery tours across the region.

guide:3-tage-trier.heading: Tours for three days in Trier

guide:trier-mit-kindern.heading: Family-friendly tours in Trier
guide:trier-mit-kindern.intro: Guided walks and a Mosel cruise are a great fit for a day out with kids.

guide:trier-bei-regen.heading: Tours for rainy days in Trier
guide:trier-bei-regen.intro: On rainy days, tours through the Imperial Baths, Basilica and museums offer shelter and plenty of history.

event:antikenfestspiele-2026.intro: To match the Antikenfestspiele, these tours lead to the city's Roman sites.

event:olewiger-weinfest-2026.heading: Wine experiences around Trier
event:olewiger-weinfest-2026.intro: If you're visiting the Olewig Wine Festival, you can discover Mosel wine on these tours too.

event:weihnachtsmarkt-2026.heading: City tours in the Advent season
event:weihnachtsmarkt-2026.intro: Before or after the Christmas market, a guided walk through the Old Town is well worth it.

event:altstadtfest-2026.heading: Tours through Trier's Old Town
event:altstadtfest-2026.intro: These walks show off the highlights of the Old Town around the festival.

event:brot-und-spiele-2026.heading: Roman Trier up close
event:brot-und-spiele-2026.intro: These tours of the ancient monuments are a perfect match for the Brot und Spiele Roman festival.

event:mosel-wein-nachts-bummel-2026.heading: Experience Mosel wine

event:stadtmuseen-lange-nacht-2026.intro: Around the Long Night of Museums, these tours dive deeper into the city's history.
